name: Pokhara
short_description: Pokhara is a scenic lakeside city known for Phewa Lake and Himalayan views.
full_description: Pokhara is Nepal’s premier tourist destination known for its serene lakes, adventure sports, and breathtaking Himalayan views. It serves as a gateway to the Annapurna region and offers a perfect mix of relaxation and adventure with paragliding, boating, hiking, and vibrant nightlife.
best_time_to_visit: September to November and March to May
weather: Mild and pleasant most of the year

name: Kathmandu
short_description: Kathmandu blends ancient heritage with vibrant modern city life.
full_description: Kathmandu, the capital of Nepal, is a cultural and historical hub filled with UNESCO World Heritage Sites, ancient temples, and bustling streets. It represents centuries of Himalayan civilization with rich architecture, traditions, and spiritual significance.
best_time_to_visit: September to November and February to April

name: Bhaktapur
short_description: Bhaktapur is a preserved medieval city rich in culture and architecture.
full_description: Bhaktapur is a beautifully preserved ancient city known for its traditional Newari culture, pottery, wood carvings, and medieval architecture. It offers an authentic glimpse into Nepal’s historical lifestyle and craftsmanship.
best_time_to_visit: Year-round, best in autumn and spring

name: Lumbini
short_description: Lumbini is the birthplace of Lord Buddha and a global pilgrimage site.
full_description: Lumbini is one of the most sacred Buddhist pilgrimage sites in the world, marking the birthplace of Lord Buddha. It features monasteries built by different countries, peaceful gardens, and spiritual monuments.
best_time_to_visit: October to March

name: Mustang
short_description: Mustang is a remote Himalayan desert region with ancient Tibetan culture.
full_description: Mustang is a mystical trans-Himalayan region of Nepal known for its desert-like landscapes, ancient monasteries, caves, and strong Tibetan cultural influence. It offers a unique blend of spiritual heritage and rugged adventure in one of Nepal’s most isolated regions.
best_time_to_visit: May to October
weather: Dry and windy with cold nights

name: Ilam
short_description: A peaceful hill town famous for lush tea gardens and rolling green hills.
full_description: Ilam is renowned for its expansive tea estates, cool climate, and beautiful landscapes. Visitors enjoy tea garden walks, sunrise viewpoints, and rich local culture in eastern Nepal.
best_time_to_visit: October to April

name: Annapurna Base Camp
short_description: A breathtaking trek into the heart of the Annapurna range.
full_description: The Annapurna Base Camp trek takes you deep into the Annapurna Sanctuary surrounded by towering peaks. It offers diverse landscapes including forests, villages, rivers, and glaciers leading to the base of Annapurna I.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November
weather: Cold at base camp, mild lower regions

name: Mardi Himal
short_description: A short and scenic trek with close mountain views.
full_description: The Mardi Himal trek is a relatively short yet spectacular trail offering close-up views of Machhapuchhre and Annapurna. It passes through forests, ridges, and alpine landscapes with fewer crowds.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November

name: Langtang Valley
short_description: A beautiful valley trek with mountains and Tamang culture.
full_description: Langtang Valley is a stunning trekking destination offering glaciers, forests, and traditional Tamang villages. It is one of Nepal’s most accessible Himalayan treks with rich biodiversity and cultural experiences.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November

name: Tilicho Lake
short_description: One of the highest lakes in the world surrounded by Himalayas.
full_description: Tilicho Lake is one of the highest lakes in the world located in the Annapurna region. The trek features dramatic landscapes, high passes, and stunning alpine scenery.
best_time_to_visit: April to November

name: Everest Base Camp
short_description: A legendary trek to the base of Mount Everest.
full_description: The Everest Base Camp trek is one of the most iconic trekking experiences in the world. It takes you through Sherpa villages, glaciers, and high-altitude landscapes leading to the base of Mount Everest.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November

name: Manaslu Circuit
short_description: A remote trek around Mount Manaslu with rich culture.
full_description: The Manaslu Circuit trek is a remote and less crowded Himalayan route circling Mount Manaslu. It offers diverse landscapes, Tibetan-influenced villages, and challenging high passes.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November

name: Ghorepani Poonhill
short_description: Famous sunrise viewpoint over Annapurna and Dhaulagiri ranges.
full_description: The Ghorepani Poonhill trek is a short and popular route offering one of the best sunrise views in Nepal. It passes through rhododendron forests and traditional villages.
best_time_to_visit: October to April

name: Kanchenjunga Base Camp Trek
short_description: A remote Himalayan trek leading to the base of the world's third-highest mountain.
full_description: Kanchenjunga Base Camp Trek is one of Nepal's most remote and rewarding trekking adventures. Passing through pristine forests, traditional villages, and alpine landscapes, the trek offers spectacular views of Kanchenjunga (8,586m) while providing an authentic wilderness experience away from crowded trails.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November
weather: Cold at high altitude with stable weather during trekking seasons

name: Dhorpatan Trek
short_description: A beautiful off-the-beaten-path trek through Nepal's only hunting reserve.
full_description: The Dhorpatan Trek takes travelers through alpine meadows, traditional Magar villages, and Nepal's only hunting reserve. The route offers peaceful trails, diverse wildlife, and spectacular Himalayan scenery.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November
weather: Cool to cold depending on altitude

name: Gosaikunda Trek
short_description: A sacred alpine lake trek in Langtang National Park.
full_description: The Gosaikunda Trek leads to the holy alpine lakes revered by Hindus and Buddhists. Surrounded by snow-capped peaks and pristine landscapes, it combines natural beauty with spiritual significance.
best_time_to_visit: March to May and September to November

name: Manang
short_description: Manang is a high-altitude valley on the Annapurna Circuit route.
full_description: Manang is a breathtaking high-altitude valley surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks. It is a major stop on the Annapurna Circuit, known for its stunning landscapes, Tibetan-influenced culture, and challenging trekking environment.
best_time_to_visit: March to November
weather: Cold and dry with thin air

name: Ghandruk
short_description: Ghandruk is a scenic Gurung village with Annapurna views.
full_description: Ghandruk is a beautiful traditional Gurung village offering spectacular views of Annapurna and Machhapuchhre. It is known for its stone houses, warm hospitality, and cultural richness along the Annapurna trekking routes.
best_time_to_visit: September to May

name: Rara Lake
short_description: Nepal's largest freshwater lake surrounded by pristine forests.
full_description: Rara Lake is one of Nepal's most spectacular natural destinations, known for its crystal-clear blue waters, peaceful surroundings, and untouched wilderness inside Rara National Park.
best_time_to_visit: April to June and September to November

name: Shey Phoksundo
short_description: A stunning alpine lake surrounded by dramatic cliffs and national park landscapes.
full_description: Shey Phoksundo National Park is home to Nepal's deepest lake and spectacular mountain scenery. It offers visitors a unique combination of Tibetan culture, wilderness, and breathtaking landscapes.
best_time_to_visit: May to October

name: Chitwan
short_description: Chitwan is famous for jungle safaris and rich wildlife.
full_description: Chitwan is home to Chitwan National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its rich biodiversity including rhinos, tigers, elephants, and exotic bird species. It is one of Nepal’s best wildlife adventure destinations.
best_time_to_visit: October to March

name: Bardia National Park
short_description: Nepal's largest lowland national park known for wildlife safaris.
full_description: Bardia National Park offers excellent opportunities to spot Bengal tigers, one-horned rhinoceroses, elephants, crocodiles, and hundreds of bird species in an untouched jungle environment.
best_time_to_visit: October to March

name: Koshi Tappu Wildlife Reserve
short_description: A paradise for bird lovers and wetland wildlife enthusiasts.
full_description: Koshi Tappu Wildlife Reserve protects Nepal's important wetland ecosystem and is internationally recognized for migratory birds, wild water buffalo, and diverse aquatic habitats.
best_time_to_visit: October to March

name: Shuklaphanta National Park
short_description: A hidden wildlife gem famous for vast grasslands and swamp deer.
full_description: Shuklaphanta National Park is known for its extensive grasslands, swamp deer population, Bengal tigers, elephants, and exceptional bird diversity, making it one of Nepal's underrated wildlife destinations.
best_time_to_visit: October to March
